chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Transfer. Appln. No. S – 34 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 29.04.2024 Mr. Muhammad Imran Soomro, Advocate along with Applicant Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant Prosecutor General for the State Private respondent Zafar Iqbal in person >>>>>..<<<<< This application is allowed with consent of all. The Direct Complaint No.123 of 2023 for offence under Sections 337-L(ii), 504 and 506/2 PPC (Re- Yasir Ali vs. Zafar Iqbal) is hereby withdrawn from the file of 2nd Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate, Sukkur and transferred to 1st. Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate, Pano Akil for expeditious trial and disposal in accordance with law. The application is accordingly disposed of. Judge ARBROHI
